description: Restaurant iftar buffet promotions featuring pricing, menu variety, and location details with Ramadan greetings and food photography.
structural_recipe: Post high-quality food photography of iftar spread or plated items. Lead with 'رمضان مبارك' greeting. Include restaurant name and location (📍). State per-person price in SAR clearly. List menu highlights or buffet items offered. Tag photographer or restaurant account. Use relevant emojis (🌙✨ for Ramadan). Keep captions in Arabic with optional English restaurant names.
why_it_works: Ramadan dining content aligns with strong family dining traditions and increased restaurant traffic during breaking fast. Transparent pricing builds trust. Location tags enable local discovery. Food quality photography and price-value messaging drive reservations and visits during peak dining season.
transplantation_caveats: Timing critical - content performs during Ramadan month only
Price sensitivity high - must reflect local market rates (150-250 SAR per person range observed)
Arabic-first captions essential for Saudi audience authenticity
Alcohol-free messaging implicit - avoid any contradictions
cultural_constraints: Must respect Ramadan timing and fasting significance
Avoid content during fasting hours that could appear insensitive
Family-oriented framing preferred over party/nightlife angles
